texto: I think every day how incredibly lucky it is that I travel around the world playing to thousands of people.
explicacao: Citação de Bernard Sumner sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I think every day how incredibly lucky it is that I travel around the world playing to thousands …” articula reflexao, day, world em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como viagem e world.

texto: We played at a festival in Mexico City, at the same time as another famous artist, and I reckon we had 55,000 people watching New Order; the other had 7,000. I think from that I've discovered the secret of success in the music industry: don't do any promotion.
explicacao: Citação de Bernard Sumner sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “We played at a festival in Mexico City, at the same time as another famous artist, and I reckon w…” articula reflexao, success, music em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como music e time.

frase_original: We played at a festival in Mexico City, at the same time as another famous artist, and I reckon we had 55,000 people watching New Order; the other had 7,000. I think from that I've discovered the secret of success in the music industry: don't do any promotion.

texto: Time is a curious thing. When you have it before you, it's something you take for granted and it moves slowly. Then, as you get older, it accelerates. When I look back, it seems such a long distance travelled, so long ago, so dream-like.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Bernard Sumner: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “Time is a curious thing. When you have it before you, it's something you take for granted and it …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, aging, time pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de viagem e time.

frase_original: Time is a curious thing. When you have it before you, it's something you take for granted and it moves slowly. Then, as you get older, it accelerates. When I look back, it seems such a long distance travelled, so long ago, so dream-like.

texto: When there's no stimulus to be found on the outside, you have no option but to look inside yourself for inspiration, and when I did it set off a creativity that had always been inside of me, It mixed with my environment and life experiences to make something tangible,something that expressed me.
